title: Accordion
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Accordion wrapper composed from the local Base UI Accordion primitive, shadcn accordion slots, local class canonicalization, and deterministic local examples.

examples.title: AccordionBasic
examples.description: FAQ accordion with one item open.

examples.title: AccordionMultiple
examples.description: Settings accordion with multiple open items.

examples.title: AccordionDisabled
examples.description: FAQ accordion with a disabled item.

examples.title: AccordionRtl
examples.description: RTL accordion layout with local static labels.

examples.title: AccordionCard
examples.description: Accordion inside a local static card shell.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Accordion attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages. The wrapper preserves shadcn slots and classes over the local Foldkit primitive.

deviations.summary: Examples use local static Card, icon, and RTL shells instead of origin app dependencies.
deviations.rationale: Those components are outside this component slice. Static local markup preserves the relevant Accordion DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts without adding unavailable registry dependencies.
